info.name: Scriptify AI — End-to-End Test Suite
info.description: Postman test suite mapping perfectly to the E2E test cases. Uses automated pm.test assertions.

exec: pm.test('Status 201 Created', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test('User created and OTP sent', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.message).to.exist; pm.expect(res.user).to.exist; });
pm.test('Status 200 OK (Requires manual OTP entry in variables)', () => { if (pm.response.code !== 200) console.log('Note: OTP must be fetched from email or DB for this test to pass'); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.response.code === 403) console.log('Email not verified. Run verify step first.'); else pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Extract and set tokens', () => { if (pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', res.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', res.refreshToken); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('refreshToken')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Returns new token pair', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.accessToken).to.exist; pm.expect(res.refreshToken).to.exist; pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', res.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', res.refreshToken); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Sends reset OTP', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.message).to.exist; });
pm.test('Status 200 OK (Requires manual reset OTP)', () => { if (pm.response.code !== 200) console.log('OTP invalid/missing'); });

formdata.value: This is a detailed blog post content generated for testing purposes. It must contain enough text to pass validation.

exec: pm.test('Status 201 Created', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test('Extract Blog ID', () => { if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('blogId', res.blog._id); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Returns paginated array of blogs', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.blogs).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(res.total).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Returns full blog object', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res._id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')); } });

formdata.value: Updated content that still satisfies length validations.

exec: pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Returns updated blog', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.blog.title).to.include('UPDATED'); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Toggles like state', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('liked'); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Toggles bookmark state', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('isBookmarked'); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('targetUserId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Updates followers/following array', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('isFollowing'); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Returns ranked array of blogs', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.blogs).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Returns structured JSON blog post', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('title'); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('content'); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Returns polished text', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('improvedContent'); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

pm.test('Returns tags, keywords, metaDescription', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.tags).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(res.keywords).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('metaDescription'); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Returns an image URL', () => { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.imageUrl).to.be.a('string'); });
pm.test('Status 201 Created', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('blogId')) pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Extract Comment ID', () => { if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('commentId', res.comment._id); } });

pm.test('Comment flagged by AI', () => { if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.comment.isFlagged).to.be.true; pm.expect(res.comment.isApproved).to.be.false; } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('adminToken')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Returns platform stats', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('totalUsers'); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('totalBlogs'); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('adminToken')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Returns list of toxic comments', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res.comments).to.be.an('array'); } });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('adminToken') && pm.collectionVariables.get('commentId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Status 200 OK', () => { if(pm.collectionVariables.get('adminToken') && pm.collectionVariables.get('targetUserId')) pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Suspended user cannot login', () => { if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(res).to.have.property('isSuspended'); } });
